executives.name: Diane Leopold
executives.background: Diane Leopold is executive vice president and chief operating officer of Dominion Energy. She has served in this role since October 2020. She joined the company in 1995 and has held various leadership positions in the energy infrastructure and commercial business units.

executives.name: Sherry Aaholm
executives.background: Sherry A. Aaholm is the former Vice President and Chief Digital Officer of Cummins Inc. She joined the ODFL board in 2022.

executives.name: Tom Pettit
executives.background: Mr. Pettit has served as Chief Operations Officer since 2020. Prior to joining Generac, he held senior leadership roles at several global manufacturing companies.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President / Chief Integrated Supply Chain Officer

She joined the company in 1995 and has held various leadership positions in the energy infrastructure and commercial business units.
